task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL GUI is open and the object panel on the right side lists '1HSG' or '1hsg'. A protein structure should be visible in the main viewer.

task_completion.description: Identify water molecules within 4.0 A of the inhibitor (MK1)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL viewer shows the inhibitor molecule (MK1) and nearby water molecules (often represented as red crosses, dots, or spheres) highlighted or selected. There may be a selection named in the right panel indicating a distance-based selection (e.g., 'sele').

task_completion.description: Measure the distance from the flap water to the Ile50 backbone nitrogen
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashed measurement line is visible in the PyMOL viewer connecting a water molecule to the protein backbone (specifically the flap region, residue 50). A distance label (typically a number around 2.5 to 3.5) should be visible on the dashed line.

task_completion.description: Create and save a publication-quality figure of the active site
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window, file manager, or image viewer shows the file 'hiv_water_network.png' located in the '~/PyMOL_Data/images/' directory.

task_completion.description: Write a plain-text report summarizing the findings
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output (e.g., using 'cat') shows the contents of 'hiv_water_report.txt' in '~/PyMOL_Data/'. The text must include a specific number for the water count, a specific distance value for the flap water to Ile50, and at least two other active site residues.

integrity.description: The agent actually used PyMOL to view and analyze the structure
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the PyMOL graphical user interface open with the 1HSG structure loaded, rather than the agent just writing a Python script without ever opening the viewer.

integrity.description: The agent performed the distance measurement in the software
integrity.visual_evidence: A measurement object (dashed line with a number) is clearly visible in the PyMOL 3D viewer, proving the agent didn't just look up the expected distance online.

integrity.description: The report contains actual findings rather than copied prompt text
integrity.visual_evidence: The text report contains concrete numbers for the water count and distance, and specific residue names/numbers, rather than placeholder text or a direct copy-paste of the task instructions.
